metadata.title: Cambridge Movers Gold Mock 1
metadata.description: Manually authored A1 Movers gold mock — full 51-item form with listening, reading & writing, and speaking tasks aligned to the M2.0 blueprint.
metadata.authoringNotes: M4.1 Gold Mock — manually authored and academically reviewed.

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Look at the pictures. Listen and draw a line from each name to the correct person.

This is Mia. She's holding a tennis racket.
Hugo is my classmate. He's got curly black hair.
Eva always sits at the front desk in our classroom.
Look at Leo. He's running in the school race.
Nina's got a new green scarf today.
Max is standing between Anna and Kim in the team photo.
audio.caption: Link names to pictures

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and write the missing word or number.

Grandma has got a friendly brown dog called Patch.
The roses in Grandma's garden are red.
Grandma is making biscuits in the kitchen.
There are ten chairs in the dining room.
The weather is windy today.
The train arrived at half past three.
audio.caption: Write words or numbers

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and tick the correct picture.

The children are swimming in the lake at summer camp.
They eat cereal and fruit for breakfast every morning.
Tom can play the guitar and he loves singing too.
The weather at camp is hot and sunny this week.
On the forest walk they see rabbits and squirrels.
Tonight they are going to watch a film outside under the stars.
audio.caption: Tick the correct picture

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and colour or draw.

Colour the lamp purple, please.
Now colour the jacket on the chair orange.
Draw a clock on the wall above the bed.
Colour the fish in the bowl blue.
Draw a plant next to the window.
Draw a line from the boy to his school bag.
audio.caption: Colour and draw

questions.questionText: Read the sentence. Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: Every morning I brush my teeth before breakfast.

questions.questionText: Read the sentence. Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: After school my sister is practising the piano.

questions.questionText: Read the sentence. Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: On Saturdays we visit our grandparents and play board games.

questions.questionText: Read the sentence. Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: I've got a new pair of trainers for the school sports club.

questions.questionText: Read the sentence. Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: Our rabbit is sleeping under the table in the living room.

questions.questionText: Read the sentence. Choose the correct picture.

content.passage: It's raining, so Dad is driving us to school today.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Hi! I'm Pablo from Spain. I'm ten years old. I love football and I play in a team after school. My best friend is called Diego. We often ride our bikes to the park.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Last Tuesday our class visited the science museum. We saw robots and a planetarium show. The guide told us about space. We ate our lunch in the museum café and bought postcards in the shop.

choices.text: The class went to a science museum.
They saw dolphins at the museum.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Every Wednesday I go to cooking club at school. This week we are making vegetable soup. First we wash the carrots and potatoes. Then we cut them carefully with a knife. I really enjoy cooking with my friends.

choices.text: They are making vegetable soup this week.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Our school library is open every day. You can borrow two books for one week. I like adventure stories and books about animals. The librarian helps us find good books to read.

choices.text: The library is only open on Mondays.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Next month my family is going to stay at a campsite near a lake. We are going to swim and cook food on a campfire. My dad says the weather will be warm but we must take raincoats too. I am very excited!

choices.text: They are going to stay at a campsite.
They are going to live in a hotel in the city.
They are not taking any clothes.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: At our school we learn about the environment. We must put paper and plastic in different bins. Our teacher says we mustn't waste water when we wash our hands. Last week we planted trees in the school garden.

choices.text: Students must recycle paper and plastic.
They planted trees in the ocean.
They can throw all rubbish in one bin.

questions.questionText: Look at the two pictures. Tell your partner about the differences.

content.prompt: Look at the two pictures of a park. Tell your partner about five differences between them.
followUpQuestions: How many ducks are in the lake in picture A?
What colour is the bench in picture B?
Is there a dog in both pictures?
Where is the kite in picture A?
What is the boy holding in picture B?

questions.questionText: Answer the examiner's questions about you.

content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about yourself, your family, school and free time.
followUpQuestions: What's your name and how old are you?
What do you usually do after school?
What sport or hobby do you enjoy most?

questions.questionText: Look at the pictures and tell the story.

content.prompt: Look at these pictures and tell the story of how Anna found her lost dog.
followUpQuestions: Where did she find the dog?
How did Anna feel at the end?
What did she do when she saw her dog?

coverageAchieved.notes: Authored for M3.1 Gold Mock specification.
